title: React Hooks Overview
content: useState manages local state. useEffect handles side effects like API calls and subscriptions. useContext shares state across components without prop drilling.

title: Express REST API Basics
content: GET retrieves data, POST creates new records, PUT updates existing records, DELETE removes records. Always return proper HTTP status codes.

title: CSS Flexbox Notes
content: display: flex activates flexbox. Use justify-content for horizontal alignment and align-items for vertical. flex-direction: column stacks elements vertically.
